channel.title: Immigration on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Immigration on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Welcome to Guyana: The World Discovered Us
item.description: Tourists, investors, oil workers, and opportunists line up at Georgetown immigration as a tanker registers under the Guyana flag. The immigration officer holds on for dear life while a new sign goes up: Please confirm you actually from here.

item.title: Caribbean Brief: Barbados Elections Feb 11, US Visa Crackdowns, Trinidad's AI Push, and Jamaica's IMF Return
item.description: Regional roundup: Mia Mottley goes for third term, US tightens visa rules for pregnant travelers, Trinidad partners with Microsoft on AI, and Jamaica seeks IMF help again.
